strategy: Crying Sky raid boss: it caps all damage at 1 with Equalize and shields itself with an Invulnerability Aura, so you cannot burst its 100 health early.
Each aura makes it immune to all schools except two announced ones, and any damage it takes Exit-Combats the caster and swaps the aura — so expect to cycle through it, not tank it down.
Survive its aura cycles: it Deer Knights the whole team for 20% max health at the end of every round, so keep healed and manage the chip.
After 7 aura cycles it casts Doom & Gloom and removes the damage cap — that's your window to finish its 100 health with the currently allowed school.
Don't Supernova it (that only deals 1 and heals it to full); wait out the cycles, then hit with an allowed school.
cheatNotes: Round 1 it casts an Equalize Global setting the damage cap to 1 — no real damage lands until this is gone.
It then puts up an Invulnerability Aura making it immune to all schools except a specific one or two (announced each time).
Using Supernova only deals 1 damage and lets it Blessing itself back to full health — don't Supernova it.
Any damage it takes makes it Supernova itself, Exit-Combat the caster, and swap to a new immunity aura — so you can't just grind it down.
At the end of every round it Deer Knights the whole team for 20% of max health — keep healed through the cycles.
After 7 aura cycles it casts Doom & Gloom and removes the damage cap — that's your window to finish its 100 health with the allowed school.
